description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte gray finish and angular contours. The stock is skeletonized and adjustable, providing ergonomic support for the user. The main body includes a prominent pistol grip and a trigger guard, with vented panels along the receiver for heat dissipation. A compact optical sight is mounted on the top rail, enhancing aiming precision. The barrel is slim and extends from the main body, with a small muzzle device at the tip. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, polymer and metal build suitable for urban operations.
description: A modern, matte gray tactical rifle with a skeletonized adjustable stock, compact optical sight, and vented receiver panels. The design is angular and ergonomic, built for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, muzzle device, and the circular lens of the optical sight.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the skeletonized adjustable stock, pistol grip, vented receiver, and mounted optical sight.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the open structure of the stock and the alignment of the sight and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the stock and receiver details.
